name: Magnified Moon Specs

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Magnified Moon Specs Phase 2 Item Level 127 Binds when picked up Head Leather 326 Armor +22 Stamina +24 Intellect Meta Socket Blue Socket Socket Bonus: +5 Spell Damage and Healing Durability 70 / 70 Requires Level 62 Requires Engineering (350) Equip: Improves spell critical strike rating by 41. Equip: Increases damage and healing done by magical spells and effects by up to 50. Equip: Shows the location of all nearby gas clouds on the minimap. Equip: Slightly increases your stealth detection. Use: Allows you to look far into the distance. (3 Sec Cooldown) Sell Price: 4 93 43 This epic leather armor of item level 127 goes in the "Head" slot. It is crafted. Added in World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade. Always up to date.
